evidence_excerpt: During follow-up, she developed depression and suicidal tendencies; after psychiatric evaluation she was diagnosed with major depression and started on antidepressant medication.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Major depression with suicidal tendencies identified during follow-up; antidepressant therapy initiated, indicating prominent ongoing symptoms affecting daily life.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: During the follow up visits, we noticed depression and suicidal tendencies… she was diagnosed with major depression.
After a comprehensive psychiatric evaluation, she was… put on anti-depressant medication.

notes_on_uncertainty: The exact timing and duration of follow-up visits are not specified. There is no clear documentation that hormone replacement therapy was initiated; management decisions regarding mitral valve prolapse were conservative. Long-term classifications are based on the documented psychiatric deterioration after diagnosis, but persistence beyond the immediate follow-up period is not quantified.
